subcodes.first_line: O thou steadfast servant of the Divine Threshold! All men seek freedom, aspire unto nobility, and pursue lordship [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده پاینده آستان حق جمیع خلق آزادگی خواهند و بزرگواری جویند و سروری
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @thankfulness; gratitude, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
